key.name: selected-team
key.description: The team whose next 2026 FIFA World Cup match is shown in the top bar.

key.name: show-flags
key.description: Whether to append each team's flag emoji to its name. Turn this off if flags do not render on your system.

key.name: auto-update
key.description: Whether the extension should occasionally fetch the configured schedule feed and cache it locally.

key.name: schedule-url
key.description: Remote JSON schedule feed used to add or override fixtures after the bundled group-stage schedule.

key.name: last-update-check
key.description: Unix timestamp of the last remote schedule update check.
